<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8"/>
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
  <title>Main Ring Bling — Luxury Show Clothing</title>
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com"/>
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin/>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,500;0,600;1,300;1,400&family=Montserrat:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Great+Vibes&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>

  <style>
    /* ─── TOKENS ─── */
    :root {
      --black:       #0a0a0a;
      --off-black:   #111111;
      --white:       #f8f5f0;
      --cream:       #ede9e0;
      --gold:        #c4973a;
      --gold-light:  #e0bb6e;
      --gold-pale:   rgba(196,151,58,0.15);
      --gold-border: rgba(196,151,58,0.35);
      --gray:        #555;
      --gray-lt:     #999;
      --ease:        cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1);
    }

    /* ─── RESET ─── */
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
    html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
    body {
      font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
      font-weight: 300;
      background: var(--white);
      color: var(--black);
      overflow-x: hidden;
    }
    img { display: block; max-width: 100%; }
    a { text-decoration: none; color: inherit; }

    /* ─── NAV ─── */
    #nav {
      position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
      z-index: 900;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
      padding: 22px 56px;
      transition: background 0.5s var(--ease), padding 0.4s var(--ease), border-color 0.5s;
      border-bottom: 1px solid transparent;
    }
    #nav.solid {
      background: rgba(10,10,10,0.97);
      backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
      -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
      padding: 14px 56px;
      border-color: var(--gold-border);
    }
    .nav-logo-svg { height: 52px; width: auto; color: #fff; }
    .nav-links {
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 40px;
      list-style: none;
    }
    .nav-links a {
      font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500;
      letter-spacing: 2.8px; text-transform: uppercase;
      color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85);
      transition: color 0.3s;
      position: relative; padding-bottom: 3px;
    }
    .nav-links a::after {
      content: ''; position: absolute;
      bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 1px;
      background: var(--gold);
      transform: scaleX(0); transform-origin: left;
      transition: transform 0.35s var(--ease);
    }
    .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--gold-light); }
    .nav-links a:hover::after { transform: scaleX(1); }
    .nav-shop-btn {
      font-size: 9.5px !important; letter-spacing: 2.5px !important;
      color: var(--gold) !important; border: 1px solid var(--gold-border);
      padding: 9px 22px; transition: background 0.3s, color 0.3s !important;
    }
    .nav-shop-btn:hover { background: var(--gold) !important; color: var(--black) !important; }
    .nav-shop-btn::after { display: none !important; }

    /* hamburger */
    .hamburger {
      display: none; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px;
      background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; padding: 4px;
    }
    .hamburger span {
      display: block; width: 26px; height: 1.5px;
      background: #fff; transition: all 0.3s;
    }

    /* ─── MOBILE MENU ─── */
    #mobile-menu {
      display: none; position: fixed; inset: 0;
      background: var(--black); z-index: 950;
      flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 44px;
    }
    #mobile-menu.open { display: flex; }
    #mobile-menu a {
      font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
      font-size: 40px; font-weight: 300; letter-spacing: 4px;
      color: #fff; transition: color 0.3s;
    }
    #mobile-menu a:hover { color: var(--gold); }
    .mobile-close {
      position: absolute; top: 28px; right: 36px;
      font-size: 26px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6);
      background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer;
      font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-weight: 300;
      transition: color 0.3s;
    }
    .mobile-close:hover { color: var(--gold); }

    /* ─── HERO ─── */
    #hero {
      position: relative; min-height: 100svh;
      background: var(--black);
      display: flex; flex-direction: column;
      align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      text-align: center; overflow: hidden;
      padding: 130px 32px 100px;
    }
    #hero::before {
      content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0;
      background:
        radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 50% at 15% 40%, rgba(196,151,58,0.09) 0%, transparent 70%),
        radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 60% at 85% 25%, rgba(196,151,58,0.06) 0%, transparent 70%);
      pointer-events: none;
    }
    .hero-top-rule {
      position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 1px;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0%, var(--gold) 50%, transparent 100%);
    }
    .hero-logo-wrap {
      width: min(340px, 82vw);
      animation: riseIn 1.4s var(--ease) both;
    }
    .hero-logo-svg { width: 100%; color: #fff; }
    .hero-script {
      font-family: 'Great Vibes', cursive;
      font-size: clamp(26px, 4.5vw, 46px);
      color: var(--gold-light);
      margin-top: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px;
      animation: riseIn 1.4s var(--ease) 0.18s both;
    }
    .hero-rule {
      width: 72px; height: 1px; margin: 0 auto 28px;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--gold), transparent);
      animation: riseIn 1.4s var(--ease) 0.3s both;
    }
    .hero-copy {
      font-size: 12px; font-weight: 300; letter-spacing: 2px;
      color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45); max-width: 420px;
      margin: 0 auto 44px; line-height: 1.9;
      animation: riseIn 1.4s var(--ease) 0.4s both;
    }
    .hero-btns {
      display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 16px;
      justify-content: center;
      animation: riseIn 1.4s var(--ease) 0.52s both;
    }
    .btn {
      display: inline-block; font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
      font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 2.8px;
      text-transform: uppercase; transition: all 0.3s var(--ease);
      padding: 16px 38px;
    }
    .btn-gold {
      background: var(--gold); color: var(--black);
      border: 1px solid var(--gold);
    }
    .btn-gold:hover { background: transparent; color: var(--gold); }
    .btn-ghost {
      background: transparent; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.75);
      border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);
    }
    .btn-ghost:hover { border-color: var(--gold); color: var(--gold); }
    .btn-dark {
      background: var(--black); color: var(--gold);
      border: 1px solid var(--gold);
    }
    .btn-dark:hover { background: var(--gold); color: var(--black); }

    .scroll-hint {
      position: absolute; bottom: 36px; left: 50%;
      transform: translateX(-50%);
      display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
      animation: riseIn 1.4s var(--ease) 1s both;
    }
    .scroll-hint span {
      font-size: 8px; letter-spacing: 3.5px; text-transform: uppercase;
      color: rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
    }
    .scroll-bar {
      width: 1px; height: 44px;
      background: linear-gradient(to bottom, var(--gold), transparent);
      animation: pulse 2.2s ease-in-out infinite;
    }

    @keyframes riseIn {
      from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(32px); }
      to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    @keyframes pulse {
      0%,100% { opacity: 0.3; transform: scaleY(0.75); }
      50%      { opacity: 1;   transform: scaleY(1); }
    }

    /* ─── SECTION COMMON ─── */
    .section-pad { padding: 108px 56px; }
    .section-pad-sm { padding: 80px 56px; }
    .inner { max-width: 1120px; margin: 0 auto; }
    .label {
      display: block; font-size: 9.5px; font-weight: 600;
      letter-spacing: 4px; text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--gold); margin-bottom: 16px;
    }
    .heading {
      font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
      font-size: clamp(38px, 5vw, 60px);
      font-weight: 300; line-height: 1.05;
    }
    .sub {
      font-size: 13.5px; font-weight: 300; line-height: 1.85;
      color: var(--gray); max-width: 500px; margin-top: 18px;
    }
    .gold-dash { width: 52px; height: 1px; background: var(--gold); margin: 22px 0; }

    /* reveal animation */
    .reveal {
      opacity: 0; transform: translateY(36px);
      transition: opacity 0.9s var(--ease), transform 0.9s var(--ease);
    }
    .reveal.on { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    .reveal-d1 { transition-delay: 0.1s; }
    .reveal-d2 { transition-delay: 0.2s; }
    .reveal-d3 { transition-delay: 0.3s; }
    .reveal-d4 { transition-delay: 0.4s; }

    /* ─── MARQUEE STRIP ─── */
    .marquee-wrap {
      background: var(--gold); overflow: hidden;
      padding: 13px 0; white-space: nowrap;
    }
    .marquee-track {
      display: inline-flex; gap: 0;
      animation: marquee 22s linear infinite;
    }
    .marquee-track span {
      font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 3px;
      text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--black);
      padding: 0 32px;
    }
    .marquee-dot {
      color: rgba(10,10,10,0.4); font-size: 6px;
      vertical-align: middle;
    }
    @keyframes marquee {
      from { transform: translateX(0); }
      to   { transform: translateX(-50%); }
    }

    /* ─── SHOP ─── */
    #shop { background: var(--cream); }
    .shop-header {
      display: flex; align-items: flex-end;
      justify-content: space-between; flex-wrap: wrap;
      gap: 24px; margin-bottom: 60px;
    }
    .grid-3 {
      display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3,1fr);
      gap: 28px;
    }
    .product-card { cursor: pointer; }
    .product-thumb {
      width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 3/4; position: relative;
      overflow: hidden; background: #141414;
    }
    /* gradient placeholders — swap for real <img> tags */
    .thumb-g1 { background: linear-gradient(145deg,#1a1510 0%,#2c2015 40%,#1a120a 100%); }
    .thumb-g2 { background: linear-gradient(145deg,#0e0e14 0%,#1a1a26 40%,#0a0a12 100%); }
    .thumb-g3 { background: linear-gradient(145deg,#12100a 0%,#221e12 40%,#100e06 100%); }
    .thumb-overlay {
      position: absolute; inset: 0;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(196,151,58,0.18) 0%, transparent 55%, rgba(196,151,58,0.08) 100%);
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    }
    .thumb-overlay svg { opacity: 0.28; width: 64px; }
    .product-thumb img {
      position: absolute; inset: 0;
      width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover;
      transition: transform 0.7s var(--ease);
    }
    .product-card:hover .product-thumb img,
    .product-card:hover .thumb-overlay { transform: scale(1.04); }
    .product-badge {
      position: absolute; top: 14px; left: 14px; z-index: 2;
      font-size: 8.5px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 1.8px;
      text-transform: uppercase; padding: 5px 11px;
      background: var(--gold); color: var(--black);
    }
    .product-info { padding: 20px 2px 0; }
    .product-name {
      font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
      font-size: 22px; font-weight: 400; margin-bottom: 5px;
    }
    .product-desc {
      font-size: 11.5px; color: var(--gray-lt);
      letter-spacing: 0.3px; margin-bottom: 11px;
    }
    .product-price { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; color: #7a5c18; letter-spacing: 1px; }
    .shop-cta-row { text-align: center; margin-top: 60px; }
    .shop-note {
      font-size: 11px; color: var(--gray-lt); letter-spacing: 1px;
      margin-top: 14px;
    }

    /* ─── RENTALS ─── */
    #rentals { background: var(--black); color: var(--white); }
    #rentals .sub { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); }
    .steps {
      display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3,1fr);
      gap: 52px; margin-top: 64px;
    }
    .step { position: relative; padding-top: 20px; }
    .step-num {
      font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
      font-size: 88px; font-weight: 300; line-height: 1;
      color: rgba(196,151,58,0.1);
      position: absolute; top: -10px; left: -6px;
      user-select: none; pointer-events: none;
    }
    .step-body { position: relative; z-index: 1; padding-top: 38px; }
    .step-icon {
      width: 36px; height: 36px; border: 1px solid var(--gold-border);
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      margin-bottom: 18px;
    }
    .step-icon svg { width: 16px; color: var(--gold); }
    .step-title {
      font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
      font-size: 22px; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 1px;
      color: #fff; margin-bottom: 12px;
    }
    .step-text { font-size: 12.5px; line-height: 1.95; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45); }
    .rental-callout {
      margin-top: 68px; padding: 34px 44px;
      border: 1px solid var(--gold-border);
      display: flex; align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 24px;
    }
    .rental-callout p {
      font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
      font-size: 19px; font-style: italic;
      color: rgba(255,255,255,0.75); max-width: 560px; line-height: 1.5;
    }

    /* ─── CONSIGNMENT ─── */
    #consignment { background: var(--white); }
    .consign-grid {
      display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
      gap: 88px; align-items: start;
    }
    .accepts-title {
      font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
      font-size: 26px; font-weight: 400; margin-bottom: 28px;
    }
    .accepts-list { list-style: none; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 14px; }
    .accepts-list li {
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px;
      font-size: 13px; color: var(--gray);
    }
    .accepts-list li::before {
      content: '◆'; color: var(--gold); font-size: 7px; flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .consign-split { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 30px; }
    .c-step { display: flex; gap: 22px; align-items: flex-start; }
    .c-num {
      font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
      font-size: 13px; color: var(--gold);
      font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 1px; flex-shrink: 0; padding-top: 2px;
    }
    .c-text strong {
      display: block; font-size: 13.5px; font-weight: 600;
      color: var(--black); margin-bottom: 5px; letter-spacing: 0.4px;
    }
    .c-text p { font-size: 12px; line-height: 1.85; color: var(--gray); }
    .consign-cta { margin-top: 40px; }

    /* ─── SHOWS ─── */
    #shows { background: var(--cream); }
    .shows-inner { max-width: 820px; margin: 0 auto; }
    .show-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
    .show-row {
      display: grid; grid-template-columns: 78px 1fr auto;
      align-items: center; gap: 36px;
      padding: 28px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
      transition: padding-left 0.35s var(--ease);
    }
    .show-row:first-child { border-top: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08); }
    .show-row:hover { padding-left: 10px; }
    .show-date { text-align: center; }
    .s-month {
      display: block; font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: 2.5px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gold);
    }
    .s-day {
      font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
      font-size: 40px; font-weight: 300; line-height: 1;
    }
    .show-info h3 {
      font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
      font-size: 22px; font-weight: 400; margin-bottom: 5px;
    }
    .show-info p { font-size: 12px; color: var(--gray-lt); letter-spacing: 0.3px; }
    .show-tag {
      font-size: 8.5px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 1.8px;
      text-transform: uppercase; padding: 6px 14px;
      border: 1px solid var(--gold); color: var(--gold); white-space: nowrap;
    }
    .show-tag.featured {
      background: var(--gold); color: var(--black);
      border-color: var(--gold);
    }

    /* ─── ABOUT ─── */
    #about { background: var(--off-black); color: var(--white); }
    .about-grid {
      display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
      gap: 88px; align-items: center;
    }
    .about-photo-wrap {
      position: relative; aspect-ratio: 4/5;
      background: linear-gradient(160deg, #181818 0%, #252525 100%);
    }
    .about-photo-wrap::before {
      content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(196,151,58,0.12) 0%, transparent 55%);
    }
    .about-frame {
      position: absolute; inset: 14px;
      border: 1px solid rgba(196,151,58,0.28);
      pointer-events: none;
    }
    .about-photo-cap {
      position: absolute; bottom: 22px; left: 22px;
      font-size: 9.5px; letter-spacing: 2.5px; text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--gold); font-weight: 500;
    }
    /* If you have a real photo, add: <img src="your-photo.jpg" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;"> */
    .about-photo-gem {
      position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%;
      transform: translate(-50%,-50%);
      opacity: 0.08;
    }
    .about-photo-gem svg { width: 120px; color: var(--gold); }

    #about .sub { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55); max-width: none; }
    .about-body { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 18px; }
    .about-body p { font-size: 13.5px; line-height: 1.9; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55); }
    .about-body p strong { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85); font-weight: 500; }

    /* ─── CONTACT ─── */
    #contact { background: var(--white); }
    .contact-wrap { max-width: 680px; margin: 0 auto; text-align: center; }
    .contact-wrap .sub { margin: 0 auto 52px; }
    .form { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 24px 28px; text-align: left; }
    .fg { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 9px; }
    .fg.full { grid-column: 1 / -1; }
    .fg label {
      font-size: 9px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 2.5px;
      text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gray-lt);
    }
    .fg input, .fg select, .fg textarea {
      border: none; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.14);
      padding: 12px 0;
      font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 13.5px; font-weight: 300;
      color: var(--black); background: transparent; outline: none; width: 100%;
      transition: border-color 0.3s; appearance: none; -webkit-appearance: none;
    }
    .fg input:focus, .fg select:focus, .fg textarea:focus { border-color: var(--gold); }
    .fg textarea { resize: none; height: 96px; }
    .form-submit { grid-column: 1 / -1; text-align: center; margin-top: 18px; }
    .success-msg {
      display: none; font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
      font-size: 20px; font-weight: 300; color: var(--gold);
      margin-top: 28px; letter-spacing: 1px;
    }

    /* ─── FOOTER ─── */
    footer { background: var(--black); padding: 64px 56px 32px; }
    .footer-inner { max-width: 1120px; margin: 0 auto; }
    .footer-top {
      display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr;
      gap: 48px; padding-bottom: 52px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(196,151,58,0.18);
      margin-bottom: 32px; align-items: start;
    }
    .footer-logo-svg { width: 160px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); }
    .footer-tagline {
      font-family: 'Great Vibes', cursive;
      font-size: 22px; color: var(--gold); margin-top: 10px;
    }
    .footer-col h4 {
      font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 3px;
      text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.35);
      margin-bottom: 20px;
    }
    .footer-col ul { list-style: none; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 11px; }
    .footer-col ul a {
      font-size: 12px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45);
      transition: color 0.3s; letter-spacing: 0.5px;
    }
    .footer-col ul a:hover { color: var(--gold); }
    .footer-bottom {
      display: flex; justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 16px;
    }
    .footer-copy { font-size: 11px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.25); letter-spacing: 0.8px; }
    .footer-social { display: flex; gap: 20px; }
    .footer-social a {
      font-size: 9.5px; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase;
      color: rgba(255,255,255,0.35); transition: color 0.3s;
    }
    .footer-social a:hover { color: var(--gold); }

    /* ─── RESPONSIVE ─── */
    @media (max-width: 960px) {
      .section-pad, .section-pad-sm { padding: 80px 28px; }
      #nav, #nav.solid { padding-left: 28px; padding-right: 28px; }
      .nav-links { display: none; }
      .hamburger { display: flex; }
      .grid-3 { grid-template-columns: repeat(2,1fr); }
      .steps { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 40px; }
      .consign-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 52px; }
      .about-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .about-photo-wrap { aspect-ratio: 16/9; }
      .footer-top { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
      .show-tag { display: none; }
      .show-row { grid-template-columns: 70px 1fr; }
    }
    @media (max-width: 640px) {
      .grid-3 { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .form { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .fg.full { grid-column: 1; }
      .hero-btns { flex-direction: column; align-items: center; }
      .shop-header { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; }
      .rental-callout { flex-direction: column; }
      .footer-top { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .footer-bottom { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; }
    }
  </style>
  <script src="https://identity.netlify.com/v1/netlify-identity-widget.js"></script>
</head>
<body>

<!-- ═══════════════ MOBILE MENU ═══════════════ -->
<div id="mobile-menu">
  <button class="mobile-close" id="mobileClose">✕</button>
  <a href="#shop"        onclick="closeMenu()">Shop</a>
  <a href="#rentals"     onclick="closeMenu()">Rentals</a>
  <a href="#consignment" onclick="closeMenu()">Consignment</a>
  <a href="#shows"       onclick="closeMenu()">Shows</a>
  <a href="#about"       onclick="closeMenu()">About</a>
  <a href="#contact"     onclick="closeMenu()">Contact</a>
</div>

<!-- ═══════════════ NAV ═══════════════ -->
<nav id="nav">
  <a href="#hero" aria-label="Main Ring Bling home">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Main Ring Bling" class="nav-logo-svg" style="height:48px;width:auto;display:block;">
  </a>

  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#shop">Shop</a></li>
    <li><a href="#rentals">Rentals</a></li>
    <li><a href="#consignment">Consignment</a></li>
    <li><a href="#shows">Shows</a></li>
    <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact" class="nav-shop-btn">Contact</a></li>
  </ul>

  <button class="hamburger" id="hamburger" aria-label="Open menu">
    <span></span><span></span><span></span>
  </button>
</nav>

<!-- ═══════════════ HERO ═══════════════ -->
<section id="hero">
  <div class="hero-top-rule"></div>

  <div class="hero-logo-wrap"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Main Ring Bling — Luxury Show Clothing" style="width:100%;height:auto;display:block;"></div>
  <div class="hero-rule"></div>
  <p class="hero-copy" id="heroTagline">Curated equestrian show attire — crafted for the competitor who refuses to choose between elegance and edge.</p>

  <div class="hero-btns">
    <a href="#shop" class="btn btn-gold">Shop the Collection</a>
    <a href="#rentals" class="btn btn-ghost">Rent a Look</a>
  </div>

  <div class="scroll-hint">
    <span>Explore</span>
    <div class="scroll-bar"></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ═══════════════ MARQUEE ═══════════════ -->
<div class="marquee-wrap">
  <div class="marquee-track">
    <span>Luxury Show Clothing</span><span class="marquee-dot">◆</span>
    <span>Clothing Rentals</span><span class="marquee-dot">◆</span>
    <span>Consignment Sales</span><span class="marquee-dot">◆</span>

    <span>Arabian Horse Specialists</span><span class="marquee-dot">◆</span>

    <span>Clothing Rentals</span><span class="marquee-dot">◆</span>

</div>

<!-- ═══════════════ SHOP ═══════════════ -->
<section id="shop" class="section-pad">
  <div class="inner">
    <div class="shop-header reveal">
      <div>
        <span class="label">The Collection</span>
        <h2 class="heading">Shop Main Ring Bling</h2>
        <div class="gold-dash"></div>
        <p class="sub">Handpicked show attire for the Arabian ring — from crystal-embellished coats to rhinestone show shirts that turn heads at every gate.</p>
      </div>
      <a href="https://mainringbling.square.site" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="btn btn-dark">View Full Shop ↗</a>
    </div>

    <div class="grid-3" id="productsGrid"></div>

    <div class="shop-cta-row reveal">
      <a href="https://mainringbling.square.site" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="btn btn-gold">Browse All Products</a>
      <p class="shop-note">Powered by Square · Secure Checkout</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ═══════════════ RENTALS ═══════════════ -->
<section id="rentals" class="section-pad">
  <div class="inner">
    <div class="reveal">
      <span class="label">Rental Program</span>
      <h2 class="heading" style="color:#fff;">Dress for the Win — Without the Investment</h2>
      <div class="gold-dash"></div>
      <p class="sub">Not every show calls for a full wardrobe purchase. Our rental program puts premium show attire within reach for every rider, every class.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="steps">
      <div class="step reveal reveal-d1">
        <div class="step-num">01</div>
        <div class="step-body">
          <div class="step-icon">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round">
              <path d="M21 10c0 7-9 13-9 13S3 17 3 10a9 9 0 0 1 18 0z"/><circle cx="12" cy="10" r="3"/>
            </svg>
          </div>
          <h3 class="step-title">Browse &amp; Select</h3>
          <p class="step-text">Browse available rental pieces by size, style, and color. Find your perfect look for upcoming shows — jackets, shirts, breeches, and accessories all available.</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="step reveal reveal-d2">
        <div class="step-num">02</div>
        <div class="step-body">
          <div class="step-icon">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round">
              <rect x="3" y="4" width="18" height="18" rx="2"/><path d="M16 2v4M8 2v4M3 10h18"/>
            </svg>
          </div>
          <h3 class="step-title">Reserve Your Dates</h3>
          <p class="step-text">Reserve your rental for show weekend. We'll confirm availability and coordinate pickup or delivery to the showground, depending on the event location.</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="step reveal reveal-d3">
        <div class="step-num">03</div>
        <div class="step-body">
          <div class="step-icon">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round">
              <path d="M12 2l3.09 6.26L22 9.27l-5 4.87 1.18 6.88L12 17.77l-6.18 3.25L7 14.14 2 9.27l6.91-1.01L12 2z"/>
            </svg>
          </div>
          <h3 class="step-title">Ride &amp; Return</h3>
          <p class="step-text">Compete in style, then simply return the piece after the show. We handle all cleaning. Damage waiver options available for added peace of mind.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="rental-callout reveal">
      <p>"Every rider deserves to enter the main ring looking like a champion — that's the whole point of Main Ring Bling."</p>
      <a href="#contact" class="btn btn-gold">Inquire About Rentals</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ═══════════════ CONSIGNMENT ═══════════════ -->
<section id="consignment" class="section-pad">
  <div class="inner">
    <div class="consign-grid">
      <div class="reveal">
        <span class="label">Consignment</span>
        <h2 class="heading">Sell Your Pieces With Us</h2>
        <div class="gold-dash"></div>
        <p class="sub">Have quality show attire collecting dust in your closet? Consign with Main Ring Bling and put it back in the ring — while putting money back in your pocket.</p>
        <br/>
        <h3 class="accepts-title">What We Accept</h3>
        <ul class="accepts-list">
          <li>Show coats &amp; jackets (all disciplines)</li>
          <li>Show shirts &amp; blouses</li>
          <li>Show breeches &amp; jodhpurs</li>
          <li>Chaps &amp; show pants (Western &amp; Saddleseat)</li>
          <li>Show boots &amp; paddock boots (excellent condition)</li>
          <li>Hats, helmets, and headwear</li>
          <li>Show accessories — spurs, belts, ties</li>
          <li>Arabian-specific show attire</li>
        </ul>
        <div style="margin-top:36px;">
          <a href="#contact" class="btn btn-gold consign-cta">Submit a Consignment Inquiry</a>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="reveal reveal-d2">
        <span class="label">How It Works</span>
        <h2 class="heading" style="font-size:clamp(30px,3.5vw,44px);">Simple. Transparent. Fair.</h2>
        <div class="gold-dash"></div>
        <div class="consign-split">
          <div class="c-step">
            <span class="c-num">01</span>
            <div class="c-text">
              <strong>Submit Your Inquiry</strong>
              <p>Tell us what you have — photos, brand, size, condition. We'll review and confirm what we can list.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="c-step">
            <span class="c-num">02</span>
            <div class="c-text">
              <strong>Drop Off or Ship</strong>
              <p>Bring items to us at a local show or Utah location, or ship to our address. We'll inspect and photograph everything.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="c-step">
            <span class="c-num">03</span>
            <div class="c-text">
              <strong>We List &amp; Sell</strong>
              <p>Your items go live in our Square shop and at shows. We handle all buyer inquiries, payment, and shipping.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="c-step">
            <span class="c-num">04</span>
            <div class="c-text">
              <strong>You Get Paid</strong>
              <p>Once sold, you receive your agreed-upon percentage. Payout via Venmo, PayPal, or check — your choice.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ═══════════════ SHOW SCHEDULE ═══════════════ -->
<section id="shows" class="section-pad">
  <div class="inner">
    <div class="shows-inner">
      <div class="reveal" style="margin-bottom:52px;">
        <span class="label">Show Schedule</span>
        <h2 class="heading">Find Us at the Ring</h2>
        <div class="gold-dash"></div>
        <p class="sub">We attend shows across Utah and Region 7. Come visit our booth to shop, try rentals in person, or drop off consignment.</p>
      </div>

      <div class="show-list" id="showsList"></div>

      <div class="reveal" style="margin-top:44px;text-align:center;">
        <a href="#contact" class="btn btn-dark">Request a Show Appearance</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ═══════════════ ABOUT ═══════════════ -->
<section id="about" class="section-pad">
  <div class="inner">
    <div class="about-grid">
      <div class="about-photo-wrap reveal">
        <div class="about-photo-gem">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 140 90" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
            <line x1="60" y1="4"  x2="80" y2="4"  stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/>
            <line x1="60" y1="4"  x2="42" y2="32" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/>
            <line x1="80" y1="4"  x2="98" y2="32" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/>
            <line x1="42" y1="32" x2="98" y2="32" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/>
            <line x1="42" y1="32" x2="70" y2="66" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/>
            <line x1="98" y1="32" x2="70" y2="66" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/>
            <line x1="60" y1="4"  x2="70" y2="32" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.5"/>
            <line x1="80" y1="4"  x2="70" y2="32" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.5"/>
            <line x1="42" y1="32" x2="70" y2="50" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.5"/>
            <line x1="98" y1="32" x2="70" y2="50" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.5"/>
            <line x1="70" y1="32" x2="70" y2="66" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.5"/>
          </svg>
        </div>
        <div class="about-frame"></div>
        <!-- ADD YOUR PHOTO: replace the div above with:
             <img src="your-headshot.jpg" alt="Main Ring Bling" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;">
        -->
        <p class="about-photo-cap">Main Ring Bling · Est. Utah</p>
      </div>

      <div class="about-body reveal reveal-d2">
        <span class="label">Our Story</span>
        <h2 class="heading" style="color:#fff;">Born in the Barn. Built for the Ring.</h2>
        <div class="gold-dash"></div>
        <p id="aboutP1">Main Ring Bling was born out of a simple truth every Arabian horse person knows: <strong>the main ring is where everything comes together.</strong> The years of training, the bond with your horse, the early mornings and late nights — it all culminates in those few minutes under the lights.</p>
        <p id="aboutP2">We believe your attire should match that moment. That's why every piece in our collection — whether purchased, rented, or consigned — is chosen with the eye of a competitor and the heart of a horse person.</p>
        <p id="aboutP3">Based in Utah and deeply rooted in the Arabian horse community, Main Ring Bling serves riders across <strong>Region 7 and beyond</strong> — from valley shows to Scottsdale. We're not just a shop; we're your ringside partner.</p>
        <div style="margin-top:36px;">
          <a href="#contact" class="btn btn-gold">Get in Touch</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ═══════════════ CONTACT ═══════════════ -->
<section id="contact" class="section-pad">
  <div class="inner">
    <div class="contact-wrap">
      <div class="reveal">
        <span class="label">Contact</span>
        <h2 class="heading">Let's Talk Shop</h2>
        <div class="gold-dash" style="margin:22px auto;"></div>
        <p class="sub">Questions about a piece, a rental, consignment, or seeing us at a show? Send a message and we'll get back to you quickly.</p>
      </div>

      <form class="form reveal" id="contactForm">
        <div class="fg">
          <label for="fname">First Name</label>
          <input type="text" id="fname" name="fname" placeholder="Aisha" required/>
        </div>
        <div class="fg">
          <label for="lname">Last Name</label>
          <input type="text" id="lname" name="lname" placeholder="Smith" required/>
        </div>
        <div class="fg">
          <label for="email">Email Address</label>
          <input type="email" id="email" name="email" placeholder="you@example.com" required/>
        </div>
        <div class="fg">
          <label for="phone">Phone (optional)</label>
          <input type="tel" id="phone" name="phone" placeholder="(801) 555-0100"/>
        </div>
        <div class="fg full">
          <label for="inquiry">Inquiry Type</label>
          <select id="inquiry" name="inquiry">
            <option value="">Select one…</option>
            <option>Shop / Purchase</option>
            <option>Rental Inquiry</option>
            <option>Consignment</option>
            <option>Show Appearance Request</option>
            <option>Custom Show Shirt</option>
            <option>General Question</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <div class="fg full">
          <label for="msg">Message</label>
          <textarea id="msg" name="msg" placeholder="Tell us what you're looking for…" required></textarea>
        </div>
        <div class="form-submit">
          <button type="submit" class="btn btn-gold">Send Message</button>
          <p class="success-msg" id="successMsg">✦ &nbsp;Thank you — we'll be in touch soon.</p>
        </div>
      </form>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ═══════════════ FOOTER ═══════════════ -->
<footer>
  <div class="footer-inner">
    <div class="footer-top">
      <div>
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Main Ring Bling" style="width:160px;height:auto;display:block;opacity:0.85;">
        <p class="footer-tagline">Luxury Show Clothing</p>
      </div>

      <div class="footer-col">
        <h4>Navigate</h4>
        <ul>
          <li><a href="#shop">Shop</a></li>
          <li><a href="#rentals">Rentals</a></li>
          <li><a href="#consignment">Consignment</a></li>
          <li><a href="#shows">Show Schedule</a></li>
          <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
          <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
        </ul>
      </div>

      <div class="footer-col">
        <h4>Services</h4>
        <ul>
          <li><a href="#shop">Browse Collection</a></li>
          <li><a href="https://mainringbling.square.site" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Square Shop ↗</a></li>
          <li><a href="#rentals">Rental Program</a></li>
          <li><a href="#consignment">Sell on Consignment</a></li>
          <li><a href="#contact">Custom Show Shirts</a></li>
          <li><a href="#contact">Show Appearances</a></li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="footer-bottom">
      <p class="footer-copy">© 2026 Main Ring Bling LLC · Utah, USA · All rights reserved</p>
      <div class="footer-social">
        <a href="https://instagram.com/mainringbling" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Instagram</a>
        <a href="https://facebook.com/mainringbling" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Facebook</a>
        <a href="https://mainringbling.square.site" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Shop</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</footer>

<!-- ═══════════════ JS ═══════════════ -->
<script>
  // ─── Nav scroll solidify ───
  const nav = document.getElementById('nav');
  window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
    nav.classList.toggle('solid', window.scrollY > 60);
  }, { passive: true });

  // ─── Hamburger / Mobile Menu ───
  const hamburger   = document.getElementById('hamburger');
  const mobileMenu  = document.getElementById('mobile-menu');
  const mobileClose = document.getElementById('mobileClose');

  hamburger.addEventListener('click', () => mobileMenu.classList.add('open'));
  mobileClose.addEventListener('click', () => mobileMenu.classList.remove('open'));

  function closeMenu() { mobileMenu.classList.remove('open'); }

  // ─── Scroll reveal ───
  const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(e => { if (e.isIntersecting) { e.target.classList.add('on'); observer.unobserve(e.target); } });
  }, { threshold: 0.12 });

  document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el => observer.observe(el));

  // ─── Contact form ───
  document.getElementById('contactForm').addEventListener('submit', function(e) {
    e.preventDefault();
    const btn = this.querySelector('button[type="submit"]');
    const msg = document.getElementById('successMsg');
    btn.textContent = 'Sending…';
    btn.style.opacity = '0.6';
    // TODO: Wire to Formspree, EmailJS, or your backend
    setTimeout(() => {
      btn.style.display = 'none';
      msg.style.display = 'block';
      this.reset();
    }, 1200);
  });

  // ─── Product cards → Square ───
  document.querySelectorAll('.product-card').forEach(card => {
    card.addEventListener('click', () => {
      window.open('https://mainringbling.square.site', '_blank', 'noopener');
    });
  });
</script>

  <!-- ═══ DYNAMIC CONTENT FROM content.json ═══ -->
  <script>
    const thumbGradients = ['thumb-g1','thumb-g2','thumb-g3'];
    const delays = ['reveal-d1','reveal-d2','reveal-d3'];

    const gemSVG = `<svg viewBox="0 0 60 40" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="width:48px;opacity:0.3">
      <line x1="23" y1="2" x2="37" y2="2"  stroke="white" stroke-width="1.2"/>
      <line x1="23" y1="2" x2="11" y2="16" stroke="white" stroke-width="1.2"/>
      <line x1="37" y1="2" x2="49" y2="16" stroke="white" stroke-width="1.2"/>
      <line x1="11" y1="16" x2="49" y2="16" stroke="white" stroke-width="1.2"/>
      <line x1="11" y1="16" x2="30" y2="36" stroke="white" stroke-width="1.2"/>
      <line x1="49" y1="16" x2="30" y2="36" stroke="white" stroke-width="1.2"/>
    </svg>`;

    async function loadContent() {
      try {
        const res  = await fetch('/content.json?v=' + Date.now());
        const data = await res.json();

        // Hero tagline
        const ht = document.getElementById('heroTagline');
        if (ht && data.hero) ht.textContent = data.hero.tagline;

        // About paragraphs
        if (data.about) {
          const p1 = document.getElementById('aboutP1');
          const p2 = document.getElementById('aboutP2');
          const p3 = document.getElementById('aboutP3');
          if (p1) p1.innerHTML = data.about.paragraph1;
          if (p2) p2.innerHTML = data.about.paragraph2;
          if (p3) p3.innerHTML = data.about.paragraph3;
        }

        // Products
        const grid = document.getElementById('productsGrid');
        if (grid && data.products) {
          grid.innerHTML = data.products.map((p, i) => {
            const badge = p.badge
              ? `<div class="product-badge">${p.badge}</div>`
              : '';
            const thumb = p.image
              ? `<img src="${p.image}" alt="${p.name}" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;">`
              : `<div class="thumb-overlay">${gemSVG}</div>`;
            return `
              <div class="product-card reveal ${delays[i] || ''}">
                <div class="product-thumb ${thumbGradients[i % 3]}">
                  ${thumb}
                  ${badge}
                </div>
                <div class="product-info">
                  <h3 class="product-name">${p.name}</h3>
                  <p class="product-desc">${p.description}</p>
                  <p class="product-price">${p.price}</p>
                </div>
              </div>`;
          }).join('');

          // Re-observe new reveal elements
          grid.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el => {
            observer.observe(el);
          });
        }

        // Shows
        const showsList = document.getElementById('showsList');
        if (showsList && data.shows) {
          showsList.innerHTML = data.shows.map((s, i) => {
            const delayClass = i > 0 ? `reveal-d${Math.min(i,4)}` : '';
            const tagClass   = s.featured ? 'show-tag featured' : 'show-tag';
            return `
              <div class="show-row reveal ${delayClass}">
                <div class="show-date">
                  <span class="s-month">${s.month}</span>
                  <span class="s-day">${s.day}</span>
                </div>
                <div class="show-info">
                  <h3>${s.title}</h3>
                  <p>${s.location}</p>
                </div>
                <span class="${tagClass}">${s.tag}</span>
              </div>`;
          }).join('');

          showsList.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el => {
            observer.observe(el);
          });
        }

      } catch(err) {
        console.warn('Content fetch failed, using static fallback.', err);
      }
    }

    loadContent();

    // Netlify Identity redirect for admin
    if (window.netlifyIdentity) {
      window.netlifyIdentity.on("init", user => {
        if (!user) {
          window.netlifyIdentity.on("login", () => {
            document.location.href = "/admin/";
          });
        }
      });
    }
  </script>
</body>
</html>
